stories.title: The Open Championship 2026: The best sights, sound...
stories.summary: Si Woo Kim and Cameron Young have passed Sam Burns on a crowded leaderboard. Check out the highlights from the final round of the Open Championship.

stories.title: White: McGregor injured ACL, not thinking future
stories.summary: Conor McGregor suffered an ACL injury during his first-round loss at UFC 329 earlier this month, according to UFC president Dana White, who added that it "isn't even worth talking about" a potential next fight at this point.

stories.title: RB Barkley, family OK after attempted burglary
stories.summary: Eagles running back Saquon Barkley and his family were unharmed after an attempted burglary of their home Saturday morning, according to the Tredyffrin Township Police Department.

stories.title: Ward, star reliever on Jays' WS teams, dies at 62
stories.summary: Duane Ward, who anchored the bullpen for the Blue Jays' back-to-back World Series-winning teams in the early 1990s, has died. He was 62.

stories.title: England hold off France to win all-time WC thrille...
stories.summary: Bukayo Saka's hat trick helped England survive a dramatic second-half comeback to beat France 6-4 in Saturday's chaotic third-place playoff.
